thor":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746241249,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7271231398659230782","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世异能、先杀圣母、不无脑、不套路、不后宫、核污染、架空、人性】
你是否想过，当大海不再蔚蓝，空气不再新鲜，人类该何去何从？
你是否想过，当畸形怪物成为新的陆地霸主，人类又该怎样生存？
这是一场史无前例的全球核污染，90%的生物因此丧生，无数畸形怪物在陆地游荡！
上一世的苏秦，由于他人背叛而丧生街头。
重生而来的他，偶然绑定了一座[末日地下城]！
在核污染彻底爆发前，他要将这座地下城打造成最强庇护所！
无数的物资，强大的队伍…
前世的仇人们，都将在这一世对他摇尾乞怜！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7f325f6a5fe32f78f366aad2bfafa946~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"常玖长久","author_id":"","book_id":"7271231398659230782","book_name":"全球核污染：我建造了末日地下城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7271643277361676862","read_count":"57","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"126040"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"59","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,求生,囤物资,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7f325f6a5fe32f78f366aad2bfafa946~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779331912&x-signature=RSDrAmWgl8G5erwqwoai9zEN4SM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103295669631","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322105152C002341B40E2268D319C"}"},"relate_info_li
